description: Style NoteThis season's french connection line features bold prints in clutches with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.Product DetailsBlack clutch with a flap with press button closureHas a main compartment with a zippered pocket, a separator, six card slots and an insert pocketsBrand badge appliqued on the frontMaterial and CarePatent leatherWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 10 cmWidth: 13 cm
